---
name: Bug report
about: A skill isn't working as expected
labels: bug
---

## Skill
Which skill is affected? (e.g., `build-list`, `enrich-contact`)

## What you expected
What should Claude have done?

## What actually happened
What did Claude do instead? Paste the output or error.

## Input you used
What did you type as `$ARGUMENTS`? Paste it here (redact any personal data).

## ZoomInfo account context
- Do you have API access enabled on your ZoomInfo account? (yes/no)
- Are you using a feature that requires a specific entitlement (Intent, WebSights, Scaling API)? If so, do you have that entitlement?

## Additional context
Anything else that might help reproduce the issue.
